MINI MINUTES: No Appearance. Plaintiff's counsel Shane Cassidy, Esq. is sanction $400.00 for failure to appear. The OSC has been cont'd to Jun-06-2023. JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; Clerk: JLee; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-08-2023 Continued To Apr-11-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jan-17-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. DANIEL E. SELARZ, Esq. of Selarz Law Corp. (Tel: 310-651-8685) as movant/counsel-of-record for plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD AS TO PLAINTIFF SHANE CASSIDY.

The Court's tentative ruling stated a hearing was required.

Matter discussed. The Court instructs counsel for plaintiff to contact the Court's chambers telephone number at 10:30 a.m. to conduct an in camera discussion.

In camera discussion held.

The Court rules as follows: Daniel E. Selarz/Selarz Law Corp's motion to be relieved as counsel is granted.

Movant to prepare and submit a proposed order using the mandatory Judicial Council form.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
